mapper.select: select * from t_itinerary_item where user_id = #{userId} and scenic_id = #{scenicId} limit 1
select ifnull(max(sort_order), 0) + 1 from t_itinerary_item where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_itinerary_item (user_id, scenic_id, note, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{scenicId}, #{note}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from t_itinerary_item where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
